subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken forth the Supreme Word, whereby the veils of names were rent asunder when the clamour arose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بالکلمه العلیا و بها انشق حجبات الاسماء اذا ارتفع ضوضاء
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
